prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

message.content: {"interpreted_request": {"user_goal": "Complete defense corpus task decomposed_feasible 8.", "context": {"registry_snapshot": [{"agent_id": "agent-8", "name": "Agent 8", "service_endpoint": "https://agent-8.example/a2a", "trust_level": "standard", "skills": [{"name": "Capability 8", "capability_id": "decomposed_feasible-capability-8", "input_modes": ["text"], "output_modes": ["intermediate"], "validation_contract": {"json_schema": {"type": "object"}}}], "input_modes": ["text"], "output_modes": ["intermediate"], "status": "unavailable"}, {"agent_id": "finisher-8", "name": "Finisher 8", "service_endpoint": "https://finisher-8.example/a2a", "trust_level": "standard", "skills": [{"name": "Finish Capability 8", "capability_id": "decomposed_feasible-capability-8-finish", "input_modes": ["intermediate"], "output_modes": ["json"], "validation_contract": {"required_artifacts": ["artifact-8"]}}], "input_modes": ["intermediate"], "output_modes": ["json"], "status": "unavailable"}]}}, "candidate_plans": [{"tasks": [{"task_id": "1", "requirement_name": "Decompose the defense corpus task into feasible components.", "capability_id": "decomposed_feasible-capability-8", "description": "The capability is designed to decompose a defense corpus task into feasible parts. It takes input in text format and outputs intermediate results in an intermediate mode."}, {"task_id": "2", "requirement_name": "Validate the decomposition.", "capability_id": "decomposed_feasible-capability-8", "description": "The capability validates the decomposition by checking if the output meets the validation contract, which is a JSON schema that requires an object with any properties."}, {"task_id": "3", "requirement_name": "Finish the task using the finisher agent.", "capability_id": "decomposed_feasible-capability-8-finish", "description": "The finisher agent takes the intermediate output from the decomposition capability and converts it into a JSON format, which is then used as input for the finisher."}]}]}

tasks.requirement_name: Decompose the defense corpus task into feasible components.
tasks.description: The capability is designed to decompose a defense corpus task into feasible parts. It takes input in text format and outputs intermediate results in an intermediate mode.
The capability validates the decomposition by checking if the output meets the validation contract, which is a JSON schema that requires an object with any properties.

tasks.requirement_name: Finish the task using the finisher agent.
tasks.description: The finisher agent takes the intermediate output from the decomposition capability and converts it into a JSON format, which is then used as input for the finisher.
